label: Transparent Caesar's mushroom motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, followed by local chroma-key removal to RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only one accurate Caesar's mushroom (Amanita caesarea) as an isolated design-system motif, with a tiny natural moss base, no wider environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A mature Caesar's mushroom with a smooth saturated orange cap, warm golden-yellow gills visible under the cap edge, yellow stipe, pale cup-like volva at the base, and a small attached cushion of oak woodland green moss. Accurate Amanita caesarea form; elegant culinary mushroom silhouette; natural fungal texture; no white wart spots.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show cap, underside/gills, stipe, volva, and moss base without cropping. Crisp silhouette edges suitable for background removal.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves orange cap, yellow gills, pale volva, moss greens, and subtle woodland moisture details.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second mushroom, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no red-and-white Amanita muscaria spots, no white cap warts, no skull or poison symbols.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Caesar's Mushroom light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Amanita Caesarea", derived from the visible transparent Caesar's mushroom cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible royal culinary system.
Reference motif: mature Amanita caesarea / Caesar's mushroom with smooth orange cap, golden-yellow gills and stipe, pale cream volva, oak woodland green moss, dark forest soil accents, refined edible mushroom identity. Use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from the motif.
Canvas: wide 16:9 4K-class board, 3840x2160 look, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid, no tiny illegible paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Amanita Caesarea, Caesar's Mushroom, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: imperial orange cap primary, golden gill yellow focus/ring, pale volva cream backgrounds, moss green success/accent, woodland umber borders, spore beige muted surfaces, deep soil brown foreground, soft mushroom shadow neutrals. Keep the palette lively but not one-note.
Typography: English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography guidance; recommend a refined humanist Latin sans with Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic support for culinary inventory, reservation, and tasting workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 予約, 在庫, 検索, 承認, 状態.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, menu/inventory table, supplier table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple lucide-style icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, background/foreground/card/popover/primary/secondary/muted/accent/destructive/border/input/ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Style: premium royal culinary product design system for chefs and dining operations, light cream surfaces, orange cap primary actions, yellow gill focus rings, moss green status accents, woodland brown structure, subtle gill-rib and moss textures, restrained shadows, 8px card radius.
Text: short readable UI labels only; exact title spelling "Morphous Amanita Caesarea".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling, no Amanita muscaria red-white spots, no skull/poison symbols, no long paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Amanita Caesarea dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Amanita Caesarea". It must feel like the same royal culinary system translated from the visible light board and the same Caesar's mushroom motif, not a new theme.
Reference motif: mature Amanita caesarea / Caesar's mushroom with smooth orange cap, golden-yellow gills and stipe, pale cream volva, oak woodland green moss, dark forest soil accents, refined edible mushroom identity.
Reference light-board system details to preserve: orange cap primary controls, gill yellow focus/ring, volva cream neutrals, moss green success/status accents, woodland umber structure, spore beige muted surfaces, deep soil foreground, precise culinary dashboard/data/forms/tables/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance, 8px card radius.
Canvas: wide 16:9 4K-class board, 3840x2160 look, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid, no tiny illegible paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Amanita Caesarea, Dark Mode, Caesar's Mushroom, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography guidance; refined humanist Latin sans with Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic support. Include short Japanese labels such as 予約, 在庫, 検索, 承認, 状態.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, menu/inventory table, supplier table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple lucide-style icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, background/foreground/card/popover/primary/secondary/muted/accent/destructive/border/input/ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep forest soil and umber, elevated panels in mushroom shadow brown, warm cream foreground text, subdued spore beige labels, orange cap primary actions, golden gill focus rings, moss green success/status accents, subtle gill-rib and moss texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Text: short readable UI labels only; exact title spelling "Morphous Amanita Caesarea".
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling, no Amanita muscaria red-white spots, no skull/poison symbols, no long paragraphs.
